title: Cheoy Lee Shipyards
description: Cheoy Lee Shipyards Ltd. specializes in the design and manufacturing of a diverse range of vessels, including tugs, ferries, crew boats, pilot boats, and luxury yachts. Their state-of-the-art facility in Zhuhai, China, is equipped with advanced machinery, enabling the production of high-quality vessels up to 70 meters in length. The company serves a global clientele, focusing on maritime industries that require innovative and efficient solutions for various operational needs. Cheoy Lee is committed to excellence, sustainability, and employee welfare, fostering a strong community within their workforce.
